Clinical Disclaimer: Implant Genius v0.5 compares radiographs against confirmed reference cases provided by a practicing oral surgeon. Results must always be confirmed by a qualified clinician. This tool does not constitute a diagnosis or treatment recommendation. Image quality, angulation, and overlying prosthetic components significantly affect accuracy.
